title: senecio trifidus
intro: Senecio trifidus, also known as Three-lobed Ragwort or Three-leafed Ragwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Senecio trifidus include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
